message:
docs: de-slopify and expand README with technical depth

De-slopify changes:
- Replace all emdashes with colons or restructured sentences
- Remove "It's not X, it's Y" pattern
- Recast sentences for more natural flow

New content sections:
- Deep Dive: Core Algorithms (SSE parser, truncation, process tree, session tree, provider abstraction)
- Performance Engineering (startup analysis, binary size breakdown, memory usage, streaming architecture)
- Design Philosophy (spec-first porting, conformance testing, no-plugin rationale, unsafe forbidden)
- Foundation Libraries (asupersync and rich_rust detailed explanations)

README now ~900 lines with comprehensive technical documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
